name: OT & IoT Security
description: Operational technology security services for industrial environments including OT network segmentation, industrial intrusion detection, secure remote access for manufacturing equipment, and convergence of IT/OT security monitoring within the SOC.
positioning: Bridge between IT security expertise and industrial operations. Critical for manufacturing and critical infrastructure customers undergoing Industry 4.0 digitalization.
competitive_moat: Combined IT/OT security monitoring, Telekom IoT connectivity integration
